headline: Garmin (GRMN) Suffers a Larger Drop Than the General Market: Key Insights
summary: Garmin (GRMN) reached $231.6 at the closing of the latest trading day, reflecting a -1.49% change compared to its last close.

headline: Apple Expands Wearables Portfolio With New AirPods Max: What's Ahead?
summary: AAPL unveils AirPods Max 2 with stronger ANC and new audio features as wearables sales slip and competition from Alphabet and Garmin heats up.
